title: Leash Everything
description:
Leash Everything allows you to attach leads to every living entity in the game 
(like villagers, creepers, endermen, etc.).
body:
Attach a lead to **almost every living entity** — creepers, endermen, skeletons, iron golems, villagers, and more. Bring them along on your journeys, or keep them safely at your base. [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1346324130261237885?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white&label=Discord&color=%235865F2)](https://discord.gg/wgSCCaQN5W) ---
--- ## Customization Want to exclude certain mobs or export for a specific mod loader? Use the **[Leash Everything Generator](https://www.sushihut.net/)** to build a custom version — no setup required. If you need help or have a specific request, join us on [Discord](https://discord.gg/wgSCCaQN5W). --- ## Installation **Datapack** 1. Download the `.zip` file. 2. Place it in `.minecraft/saves//datapacks/`. 3. Run `/reload` in-game. **Mod (Fabric / Quilt / Forge / NeoForge)** 1. Download the `.jar` file. 2. Place it in `.minecraft/mods/`. 3. Launch the game — no extra steps needed. --- ## Support Found a bug or have a suggestion? Join us on [Discord](https://discord.gg/wgSCCaQN5W).
